_schema: stage one of: BACKLOGGED > SELECTED > PREPPED > RENDERED > VERIFIED > READY | REVIEW | BLOCKED. attempts track budget spend. flags carry escalations (QUOTA, UNCONFIRMED_SOURCE, RENDER_FAIL, WRONG_FACE, NO_CAPTIONS). Only the loop writes this file.
goal: Maintain >=2 VERIFIED reels ready to post at all times (posting cadence 2x/day)
